---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new subcommand or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Why is it worth solving?

## Proposed solution

What should the command/behavior look like? Show examples:

```bash
skillctl <new-command> <args>
```

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider? Why is this better?

## Backward compatibility

Does this change any existing command, flag, or default behavior?

## Notes

Anything else.
